copied_from.display_value: Validate Outbound Email Generated by Flow

sys_atf_step.description: Validate that an email was generated by flow 'Loan Approval' matching query: Subject contains loan request for a MacBook Pro 15" has been approved With a failure timeout of 30 Seconds

step_config.display_value: Validate Outbound Email Generated by Flow

sys_atf_step.sys_name: Validate Outbound Email Generated by Flow

test.display_value: Approved branch send confirmation email to requester copy

sys_variable_value.value: subjectLIKEloan request for a MacBook Pro 15" has been approved^EQ
